title: BetterThanVanilla!
description:
Better then vanilla Minecraft! Much better*
The most important thing in this assembly:
Mods for optimization
Improved visuals of the entire game!
If you don't have Modrinth app, manual inst. for u: https://disk.yandex.ru/d/r5bcAF8mFWtOUQ
body:
![BetterThenVanillaPack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81b9fb148b624f125c6d27ee6cfab2c7db5ab8e.jpeg)Simple improvement modpack Vanilla+ For Fabric 1.20.1/Fabric 1.21 
The most important thing in this assembly: Mods for optimization Improved visuals of the entire game from tree foliage to new biomes! Beautifully customized by me, ~~BSL~~ Bliss shader! Texture packs for even greater visual improvement! (Don't forget to turn them on) Mods that improve the “Sound” in the game: music Steps, nature, interaction with the world sounds, in menu/inventory, and much more! Voice chat, New furniture in the style "Vanilla", Map/Minimap, (It is possible to hide it in the game), "First person", Seasons and different weather conditions!
